author: @stevetobias4890
text: I hear tricycle and I automatically assume a single front wheel not a single back wheel. Steering would be so much easier with a single front wheel.

author: @William_Hada
text: I can see a problem with electric cars and motorcycles catching on with certain people. They are way too quiet, not loud and obnoxious enough!  LOL!

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: LOL agreed! People want loud exhausts hahaha!! :)

author: @timothygorman7528
text: Luke, Luke, Luke.   You even got a pelvis thrust into the glance at the hot chic in the next car from your imaginary Polaris... You made my day, that was the funniest thing I've seen in a while!   Genuinely funny (I mean that, I'm not making fun of you, I'm laughing with you, that was well done - ha ha ha ha).  To top it off, back to your old self again with your brilliant laugh, and even a snort thrown in there for good measure :)   You're awesome dude :)

replies.author: @MyNameIsLukey
replies.text: Thank you mate!! honestly has made my day, when watching the vid back I couldn't resist laughing too LOL. :)

author: @totherarf
text:
I'd be taking a long hard look at your center of gravity on this one!
Both vertical and in the horizontal plane. Also you need to be sitting in front of a single rear wheel ..... unless you are looking at sitting Over the wheel (refer to line on on this)  ;0)

I do look forward to your results!

author: @GreenJimll
text: Just because something is an electric vehicle doesn't mean it can't go fast. Ask any Tesla owner. :-)

text: the spider motorcycle has three wheels but the two wheels are at the front giving better stability over having a singe wheel in front
